description: Heavy daily listeners who use advanced features, manage large libraries, and expect a premium, full-featured experience.
traits: Relies on app for daily mood

representative_reviews.review: really thankful for amazing music 🎶 from around the world with great collection of creative playlist
Fantastic music app with a huge library and excellent personalized recommendations.
This app has gotten so irritating with its constant begging for premium. I’ve tried the premium version before, but now it’s practically mandatory just to skip to the best part of my favorite songs.
what happened to the crossfade feature?

This app is so frustrating. It keeps showing ads over and over again and constantly tries to force users into buying the premium version. Now it's even saying that I can't play the songs I want because I'm only allowed to skip six songs per day. This is just too much. It used to be my favorite app, but now it's one of the worst.
The best music streaming app with an amazing library and personalized playlists. The sound quality is excellent.
Spotify is simply the best music app out there. Huge song library, perfect playlists, and the sound quality is amazing. The Discover Weekly never misses. Can’t imagine my day without it!
constant popups and so many premium ads it does not play album in order

description: Users primarily interested in podcast content, audiobooks, or spoken word — not just music streaming.
traits: May use premium for podcast features

representative_reviews.review: Spotify is honestly one of those apps that just becomes part of your daily routine without you even noticing. It’s super easy to use, and it somehow always knows what you want to hear—like the playlists and recommendations feel really personal, not random. What I like most is that it doesn’t feel limited. You can switch from music to podcasts to something new you’ve never heard before, and it all just flows naturally. It’s simple, but it doesn’t feel basic.

Spotify is much more than a music app. It is like a global library of human feelings, stories, and cultures, wrapped up in sound. It gives over 750 million people a way to find comfort, energy, or inspiration at any moment of the day, completely free. ​In the past, music was something you had to buy piece by piece, and many beautiful songs from quiet corners of the world were hard to find. Spotify has broken down those walls, making the world's music, podcasts, and audiobooks open and accessible

Spotify is an excellent music streaming app with a huge library of songs, podcasts, and playlists. The recommendations are personalized, the audio quality is great, and the interface is easy to use. It helps me discover new music and enjoy my favorite tracks anytime, anywhere. Highly recommended!"
awesome music and podcast player

Spotify is enjoyable music app with a wide variety of songs, podcasts and playing. It is easy to use and helps unders discover new artist, trending songs and personalised recommendations. You can save favourite songs and listen to music anytime.

I’ve tried other music streaming apps, but I always come back to Spotify. The curated playlists are unmatched, and it just works seamlessly on all my devices. I can play musics in phone background while scrolling text and messages. they included podcasts when I can listen while doing office work. ​
The music and the podcasts are my best of it all!. But what i don't like is the shuffle of music in the library....if that was given as a free in spotify that would have been better.
from 5 to 4 because there's no option to remove podcasts from the home page. especially ones that appear to be completely AI narrated.
